CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:DatabaseExporter.kt$DatabaseExporter$("devices", JsonArray( devicesExport.map { devMap -> buildJsonObject { devMap.forEach { (k, v) -> when (v) { is String -> put(k, v) is Number -> put(k, v) is Boolean -> put(k, v) null -> put(k, JsonNull) else -> put(k, v.toString()) } } } } ) )

ArgumentListWrapping:DatabaseExporter.kt$DatabaseExporter$("signalSamples", JsonArray( samples.map { sample -> buildJsonObject { put("deviceFingerprint", sample.deviceFingerprint) put("rssi", sample.rssi) put("timestamp", sample.timestamp) put("latitude", sample.latitude) put("longitude", sample.longitude) put("locationAccuracy", sample.locationAccuracy) } } ) )

LongParameterList:SettingsScreen.kt$( detectionEnabled: Boolean, vibrateEnabled: Boolean, soundEnabled: Boolean, headsUpEnabled: Boolean, onDetectionChange: (Boolean) -> Unit, onVibrateChange: (Boolean) -> Unit, onSoundChange: (Boolean) -> Unit, onHeadsUpChange: (Boolean) -> Unit )

LongParameterList:SettingsScreen.kt$( themeMode: String, colorSchemeName: String, useDynamicColors: Boolean, onThemeModeChange: (String) -> Unit, onColorSchemeChange: (String) -> Unit, onDynamicColorToggle: (Boolean) -> Unit )
MaxLineLength:SettingsScreen.kt$border = if (themeMode == mode) androidx.compose.foundation.BorderStroke(2.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary) else ButtonDefaults.outlinedButtonBorder
MaxLineLength:SettingsScreen.kt$color = if (uiState.updateStatus?.startsWith("Error") == true) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
